title: rubus × alsaticus
intro: Rubus × alsaticus, also known as the Alpine Blackberry or Black Raspberry, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Rubus genus, characterized by its thorny canes and dark-colored fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × alsaticus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × alsaticus fruits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus × alsaticus, such as jams, jellies, and teas, can be made by infusing the fruits in hot water or mixing them with sugar and pectin to create a sweet and nutritious spread.
